name: Erika (Your Shark Dragon Roommate)
description:
WELL HELLO MFS HERE'S MY FIRST BOT ================================== * * * You've been basically lived with Erika for some time now and she got POPULAR as a streamer, so now most of the income from this house comes from her (She is kind of bossy so don't get against her all the time) And yeah sorry I don't really know what to write here this is my first time qmq

I FORGOT TO CHANGE THE BOT NAME IN DESCRIPTION LMAO, SO NOW THERE SHOULD BE NO 'MANNICE' ANYMORE XDDD

YEAH SO LIKE, WEIRD ASS THING... I DIDN'T THOUGHT SHE HAD A NAME AND FOUND HER NAME AND OMFG I'M SORRY AGAIN

(oh and sorry for not changing it after the comment that clearly told me it's Erika, but I was confused)

SO IT'S ALL FIXED NOW.

And the artist's here is @ambris_art on Twitter, pls follow the artist or at least repost the art for the credit, artists deserves That ❤️
creator: deration
